item.command: /bin/zsh -lc 'for f in $(rg -l "typeSer'"\\w*\\.writeTypePrefix\\(|writeTypePrefix\\(g, typeId|writeTypePrefix\\(gen,|writeTypePrefix\\(g,\" src/main/java src/test/java); do echo "'$f; done'
/bin/zsh -lc 'for f in $(rg -l "typeSer'"\\w*\\.writeTypePrefix\\(|writeTypePrefix\\(g, typeId|writeTypePrefix\\(gen,|writeTypePrefix\\(g,\" src/main/java src/test/java); do echo "'$f; done'

/bin/zsh -lc "rg -n \"writeTypePrefix\\s*\\(\" src/main/java src/test/java | cut -d: -f1,2 | while IFS=: read f l; do sym="'$(sed -n "1,${l}p" "$f" | rg "''^[[:space:]]*(public|protected|private|static|final|@Override|@Deprecated|class|[A-Za-z0-9_<>, ?'"\\[\\]]+[[:space:]]+)[A-Za-z0-9_]+\\s*\\(\" | tail -n 1); printf \"%s:%s: %s\\n\" \""'$f" "$l" "$sym"; done'
